title: Lead Instructional Designer at Chandigarh University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Chandigarh University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Chandigarh University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About Chandigarh University:
Chandigarh University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Chandigarh University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
